_law: SEALED strawman parameter vector — hashed and committed BEFORE any phantom render (MEMO_LEGF §6). All values are strawmen carrying [OWNER] slots, ratified at the viewing. k=0 phantom content = NONE.
R_note: R_realized=207 is the item-343 replacement value (numeraire). Alternatives carried as labelled reference lines only (item-343 three-candidate frame); the owner rules the R slot at the viewing.

draft_capital.pool: picks 1..30 (the next-EOY National Draft class, == the existing item-12 lensPicks pool)
draft_capital.pricing: v2 curve GROSS (PVC[n]); no future-pick discount invented (item-12 defers that dial)
draft_capital.attribution: natural-order round-robin: pick n -> club at natural-order index (n-1) mod 18
draft_capital.club_natural_order: alphabetical by club name (strawman; owner may re-seal to reverse-ladder at the viewing)

exit_rule_list_size_conservation.basis: each active player's projected value at +k (vP1 / vP2, the RL_LEGE projection-law columns)
exit_rule_list_size_conservation.exit: players with vP_k < X (207) exit; their vP_k residual leaves the club total
exit_rule_list_size_conservation.list_size: CONSERVED endogenously: refill_count == exit_count (no exogenous fixed list size L)
exit_rule_list_size_conservation.refill_priority: the club's draft-capital picks (natural order, bounded by exit_count) fill first at PVC gross; the remaining freed slots fill with free intake at R=207 each
exit_rule_list_size_conservation.STRUCTURAL_STRAWMAN_FLAGGED: draft-capital picks CONSUME exit slots (bounded by exit_count), consistent with MEMO_LEGF §1 ('shed value returns as list spots + draft capital'). Alternative reading — draft picks ADD on top of a full list regardless of exits — is NOT taken; flagged for owner/supervisor ratification at the viewing.

totals_report.granularity: per club + league, per lens (bal/+1/+2), WITH and WITHOUT the phantom layer (§2.v)
totals_report.smoothing: per-pick where curves appear; NO wide/decile bins (CORE rule 7 / item 325)

gate.off_reproduces: the Leg-E boards byte-exact (this container: 83a4b21d default / 30d96f1f balanced)

k0_invariant: ZERO phantom content at k=0; the balanced board's per-player v column is byte-identical with RL_LEGF on vs off (the checkpoint law).
